metadata.description: Complete schema mapping for all critical tables. Used for validation and documentation.

naming_standards.timestamps: created_at, updated_at for row lifecycle; report_date for data observation date
naming_standards.observation_dates: date for market data (price_daily), score_date for computed scores, report_date for earnings

price_daily.purpose: Daily OHLCV data for all stocks
price_daily.critical_notes: MUST use 'date' NOT 'created_at'. No bid/ask columns.
queries_validated: SELECT close FROM price_daily WHERE symbol = ? AND date <= ?
SELECT AVG(volume) FROM price_daily WHERE symbol = ? AND date >= ? - INTERVAL '50 days'
SELECT MAX(date) FROM price_daily WHERE symbol = 'SPY'

stock_scores.purpose: Technical and fundamental score metrics per symbol/date

key_columns.score_date: DATE - date scores computed for (NOT created_at)
key_columns.short_interest_pct: NUMERIC - short interest as % of float

stock_scores.critical_notes: MUST use 'score_date' NOT 'date'. Column is 'earnings_surprise_pct' NOT 'eps_surprise_pct'.
queries_validated: SELECT signal_quality_score FROM stock_scores WHERE symbol = ? ORDER BY score_date DESC LIMIT 1

key_columns.report_date: DATE - when earnings were reported (NOT date_of_report)

earnings_metrics.critical_notes: Column is 'report_date' NOT 'date_of_report' or 'date'. Column is 'earnings_surprise_pct'.
queries_validated: SELECT report_date FROM earnings_metrics WHERE symbol = ? ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 1

earnings_history.purpose: Historical earnings dates for blocks blackout calculation
earnings_history.critical_notes: Prefer 'report_date' over 'quarter' string for date calculations.

algo_trades.purpose: All executed trades by the algorithm

key_columns.trade_date: DATE - when trade was entered (NOT entry_date)

algo_trades.critical_notes: Column is 'trade_date' NOT 'entry_date'. This is when the trade was entered.
queries_validated: SELECT trade_date FROM algo_trades WHERE symbol = ? ORDER BY trade_date DESC

algo_positions.critical_notes: No sector column yet (stub in circuit_breaker). Sector data planned for future.

algo_audit_log.purpose: Audit trail of all actions by the algorithm
algo_audit_log.critical_notes: Column is 'created_at' NOT 'timestamp'. Used for circuit breaker re-engagement timing.
queries_validated: SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM algo_audit_log WHERE action_type = 'DRAWDOWN_HALT'

sector_ranking.purpose: Ranked list of sectors by momentum
sector_ranking.critical_notes: Column is 'sector_name' NOT 'sector'. Column is 'date_recorded' NOT 'date'.
queries_validated: SELECT signal FROM sector_rotation_signal WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date)...)

industry_ranking.purpose: Ranked list of industries by momentum

trend_template_data.purpose: Minervini trend template scoring per symbol

technical_data_daily.purpose: Technical indicators (ATR, RSI, etc) per symbol/date
technical_data_daily.critical_notes: Used for stop loss calculations. Must have 'atr' column.

batch_1: loadbuyselldaily.py: Added df parameter to _generate_signal_row (was undefined)
algo_economic_calendar.py: Added missing Optional, Tuple imports
batch_2: algo_liquidity_checks.py: Fixed SELECT avg_volume, bid, ask (columns don't exist)
algo_swing_score.py: Fixed SELECT status FROM sector_rotation_signal (columns wrong)
algo_swing_score.py: Fixed SELECT short_interest_pct FROM stock_scores (column wrong)
algo_swing_score.py: Fixed SELECT eps_surprise_pct, date_of_report (columns wrong)
algo_swing_score.py: Fixed _days_to_earnings using quarter string + timedelta
algo_circuit_breaker.py: Fixed SELECT timestamp FROM algo_audit_log (column created_at)
algo_exit_engine.py: Fixed INTERVAL '%s days' SQL syntax
algo_daily_reconciliation.py: Fixed SELECT entry_date FROM algo_trades (column trade_date)

validation_rules.rule_1: Never assume a table has a 'date' column without checking schema first
validation_rules.rule_2: Observation dates use different names: date (price), score_date (scores), report_date (earnings)
validation_rules.rule_4: Always check if columns like bid, ask, spread actually exist before querying
validation_rules.rule_5: Before writing queries, verify column names in target table schema
validation_rules.rule_6: Use schema_mapping.json as reference when writing any SELECT statement
